title: convolvulus subviscidus
intro: Convolvulus subviscidus, also known as the smooth bindweed or climbing bindweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Convolvulaceae. Native to Australia, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Convolvulus subviscidus include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Convolvulus subviscidus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots can be used separately or in combination to harness its medicinal properties.
